inicio.bodega_count: You have %s wines in your cellar

comunidad.feed_subtitle: What people you follow are doing
comunidad.feed_vacio: Follow someone to see their activity here.
comunidad.sin_perfil: This user has no public profile.

qr.mensaje_hola: Hi {nombre}, great to meet you. Thanks for your time and interest.
qr.resumen_app: Vino Pro IA is your virtual sommelier: scan labels, log wines, ask for pairings and manage your cellar from your phone.
qr.beneficio_1: Direct link in the app to your winery or wine shop
qr.panel_subtitulo: Generate a unique QR for each contact. When they scan it they see a personalised page.

geolocalizacion.subtitulo: Restaurants, wine shops and bars. Use your location or search by city.
geolocalizacion.permiso_denegado: We cannot access your location. Search manually by city above.

error.nombre_corto: Name must be at least 3 characters.
error.alcohol_invalido: Alcohol content must be between 5 and 25%.
error.limite_diario: Daily limit reached. You can add more tomorrow.

info.registros_hoy: Today you have added {n} of {max} bottles.

escanear.title: Scan wine label
escanear.subtitle: Upload an image, type the wine name or enter the barcode.
escanear.hint_imagen: Recommended: JPG or PNG, under 6 MB. If your phone photo is too large or HEIC, resize it or type the wine name below.
escanear.cargando: Searching database and Open Food Facts...
escanear.error_min: Enter at least: image, text or barcode.

registrar.title: Register new wine
registrar.subtitle: All fields marked with * are required.
registrar.registros_hoy: Today you have registered {n} of {max} wines.
registrar.ya_en_base: This wine is already in our database.
registrar.no_resultados: No results. Fill in the form manually.
registrar.no_resultados_premium_cta: This wine is not in our database. Upgrade to Premium to register it and offer it to others.
registrar.oferta_crear_desc: Add a photo of the wine. It will appear on the purchase page so other users can contact you by email.

preguntar.title: Ask the sommelier
preguntar.subtitle_nube: In Cloud mode you can ask without scanning: pairings, recommendations or follow-up questions. With Consult ID (after scanning) the sommelier answers about that wine. Choose your profile.
preguntar.placeholder_pregunta: E.g.: What wine with meat? I like full-bodied reds.

bodega.title: My Virtual Cellar
bodega.subtitle: Manage your bottles. Session is saved in this browser.
bodega.sin_ofertas: You have no offers. Upgrade to Premium and offer a wine from Register.

dashboard.title: Wine Big Data
dashboard.subtitle: Search trends, scans by country and most frequent sommelier questions (last 30 days).

adaptador.title: Adapter for Restaurants
adaptador.subtitle: Connect My Cellar with your management system (CoverManager, TheFork, etc.) and get real-time stock.
adaptador.token_help: Use this token in stock endpoint requests. Keep it safe.
adaptador.webhook_help: When you update My Cellar, we will POST the current stock to this URL.

comprar.title: Where to buy this wine
comprar.sin_enlaces: No purchase links available for this wine.
comprar.sin_tiendas_nacional: No domestic stores for your country. Check the International tab.
comprar.sin_tiendas_int: No international shipping for this wine.
comprar.guia_repsol: Search on Guía Repsol (wine bars and cellars)
comprar.guia_descripcion: Discover places to enjoy wine in
comprar.oferta_usuario_desc: Contact by email. The offerer will decide whether to reply. After 3 requests with no reply the offer is removed.
comprar.solicitud_enviada: Your request has been sent. The offerer will see your message and decide whether to reply.

planes.title: Plans
planes.subtitle: Choose the one that fits you. 50 wine limit on the Free plan.
planes.caract_registrar_raros: Register wines not in the database and offer them to others
planes.limite_alcanzado: You have reached the Free plan limit (50 wines).
planes.pagos_no_disponibles: Payments are not available at the moment. Contact the administrator to enable Premium.

pago.exito_mensaje: You are now PRO. Your cellar is unlimited.
pago.cancelado_mensaje: No charge was made. You can come back anytime.

valoraciones.nota_placeholder: Optional: your tasting note or comment
valoraciones.inicia_sesion: Use the app (reload the page) so your rating is saved.

wishlist.inicia_sesion: Reload the page to save your list.
